title: Header Analyzer
helpOutput:
Usage: header-analyzer [<options>] [<file>]

  Analyze email headers from a file or stdin.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -a, --all            Show all headers, not just key ones
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <file>  File containing email headers (or - for stdin)
output:
=== Key Headers ===
{
  "From": "Example Sender \u003csender@example.com\u003e",
  "To": "Example Recipient \u003crecipient@example.net\u003e",
  "Subject": "Test Message",
  "Date": "Tue, 02 Jan 2024 12:34:56 +0000",
  "Message-ID": "\u003ctest123@example.com\u003e"
}
